texts.t002: Transparent polycarbonate folding-sliding doors — a 100% Indian-make SMARTIE innovation — plus aluminium bi-fold systems for showrooms, restaurants and industry.
texts.t011: Crystal-clear, virtually unbreakable polycarbonate leaves that fold away to open the full façade — India's only fully Indian-make system.
texts.t012: Thermally efficient aluminium-glass bi-folds for cafés, banquet halls and villas.
texts.t013: Heavy-duty folding leaves for hangars and wide industrial openings with limited headroom.
texts.t015: Polycarbonate is around 200× more impact-resistant than glass at a fraction of the weight — safer, lighter on hardware, and it keeps full transparency.
texts.t023: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t024: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
texts.t025: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
